programs.title: Come Dine With Me
programs.desc: Aodhan's night kicks off with a shocker as he reveals his alter ego and the group are left on edge by the horror themed decor.

programs.title: Come Dine With Me
programs.desc: Fourth to host is 26 year old accountant Kirsty who's  hoping for rave reviews of her Ibiza themed evening and favourite dishes.

programs.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programs.desc: Two of the nation's biggest veg-heads, comedy megastar Kitty Flanagan and plant-based maestro Katie White, are here to show Adam how they live on the veg.

programs.title: The Cook And The Chef
programs.desc: Come behind the scenes as Maggie and Simon prepare for their farewell party. Maggie cooks her delicious pork ribs and Simon prepares his spring rolls and pineapple skewers. (Final).

programs.title: Adam Richman Eats Football
programs.desc: Adam explores the football food culture of Glasgow and Celtic FC. First up is a Stornoway black pudding, then a unique haggis and whisky topped pizza.

programs.title: Destination Flavour Japan Bitesize
programs.desc: Some of your favourite moments and recipes from Adam Liaw's culinary and cultural journey through Japan from its frozen north, to cherry-blossomed mainland and tropical sun-soaked south.
